notes: Life-support blocks — revive, heal, and refuel the player when powered and activated (hold F). Survival Kit 2.5 m is the starter respawn point; Medical Room 5 m is the late-game upgrade with higher restoration rates. The generic 'Survival Kit' wiki page is a disambiguation/overview stub with no numeric stats — modeled with gameStatus='planned' until a specific sized variant is published. Every entry reports power.maxInput=0 on the wiki; almost certainly a wiki omission (the blocks explicitly require power to function). Restoration rates are per-second while activated.

resources.description: Allows Space Engineers to be revived and heal when powered and activated, critical for survival.
resources.unlock: Unlocked by default in all survival worlds

resources.description: Allows Space Engineers to be revived and heal when powered and activated, critical for survival. Higher restoration rates than the Survival Kit.

Utility block that heals, recharges, and refuels when powered. Hold F to activate. Can be registered as one of two possible respawn points. Has conveyors on top and bottom and two small ports on the sides; the front requires accessibility for screen interaction.
dataGaps: wiki page is a generic overview without numeric specs (modeled as 'planned' until a specific sized variant is documented)
